description_long: This bed features a modern, platform-style frame with a prominent, rectangular headboard adorned with a geometric pattern in wood and black tones. The bed is dressed with a loosely draped, light gray blanket and two large, square pillows, along with a smaller rectangular pillow, all in matching gray fabric. The mattress is visible beneath the bedding, with a striped pattern suggesting a fitted sheet. The base of the bed includes two black drawers, indicating built-in storage functionality. The headboard is thick and visually striking, with a combination of horizontal and diagonal black accents on a wood finish. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban interiors or loft-style settings.
description: A modern platform bed with a geometric wood and black headboard, gray bedding, and built-in storage drawers at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full headboard, gray bedding, and two storage drawers at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headboard, the draped bedding, and the striped mattress.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the geometric wood and black pattern of the headboard, with no bedding or mattress visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard's depth, the arrangement of pillows, and the draped blanket.
